title: Greg Fleming (politician)
description: New Zealand charitable sector consultant and politician
extract: Gregory Wray Fleming (born 1970 or 1971) is a New Zealand politician and Member of Parliament in the House of Representatives for the National Party. First elected in the 2023 election in the Maungakiekie electorate, he beat the incumbent Priyanca Radhakrishnan. He is a co-founder of the conservative think tank Maxim Institute and is involved in a number of Christian-based charities.
